title: Eclogue 4: The Golden Age Returns
description: The 'Messianic Eclogue' predicting the birth of a child who will usher in a new Golden Age — Christians read it as a prophecy of Christ.
introduction: The 'Messianic Eclogue' predicting the birth of a child who will usher in a new Golden Age — Christians read it as a prophecy of Christ.

translation.text: Now the last age of the Cumaean prophecy begins. The great order of the ages is born anew.
